---
title: "Resources & Extras"
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        header#title-block-header {
          display: none !important;
        }
        </style>
---

## Dollar Fifty in Late Fees at the Public Library.

-   [Monty Hall Problem — Numberphile](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4Lb-6rxZxx0)\
    A short visual re-introduction to the game-show setup and why switching wins more often.

-   [Seeing Theory — Probability Distributions](https://seeing-theory.brown.edu/probability-distributions/index.html)\
    An interactive way to look at common distribution shapes instead of only reading about them.

-   [Probability & Odds Applet](https://jonathanmbarnes.github.io/ProbsAndOddsApp/)\
    Best for counts, proportions, probabilities, odds, base rates, and why framing can distort intuition.

-   [CLT / Sampling Intuition Applet](https://jonathanmbarnes.github.io/CentralLimitApp/)\
    Best for repeated sampling, convergence, regression to the mean, and how averages stabilize faster than raw outcomes.
